code: var sem1=["Programming for Problem Solving","Digital Electronics & Logic Design","Data Structures & Algorithms","Computer Organization & Architecture","Design & Analysis of Algorithms","Database Management System","Computer Networks","Operating Systems","Formal Language & Automata Theory","Compiler Design"];var sem2=["Machine Learning","Artificial Intelligence","Speech & Natural language Processing","Neural Network and Deep Learning","Pattern Recognition"];var sem3=["Information Theory and Coding","Computer Graphics","Advance Computer Architecture","Embedded System"];var sem4=["Discrete Mathematics","Elementary Number Theory and Algebra","Probability Theory and Random Process","Engineering Economics","Environmental Sciences","Industrial Management Entrepreneurship","Professional Communication"];var sem5=["Web and Internet Technology","Cryptography and Network Security","Ad-hoc and Sensor Network","Blockchain Technology","Information Retrieval"];var sem6=["Object Oriented Programming using java","Software Interaction","Software Component Design"];var sem7=["Digital Image Processing","Bio-Informatics","Robotics and Computer Vision"];var sem8=["VLSI System Design","Human Computer Interaction","Computer Controlled Systems"];var elective=["History of Science and Engineering","Cyber Laws and Ethics","Economics Policies in India"];var project=["1 Mini Projects",'2 Major Project'];export var semList1=["Basics","Machine Intelligence","Modelling & Optimization","Managerial Skills","Advanced Networks, Security and Applications","Software Engineering","Applied Computing","Applied Systems","Open Electives ","Projects"];export var subjects1=[sem1,sem2,sem3,sem4,sem5,sem6,sem7,sem8,elective,project];

sourcesContent:
const sem1 = [
  "Programming for Problem Solving",
  "Digital Electronics & Logic Design",
  "Data Structures & Algorithms",
  "Computer Organization & Architecture",
  "Design & Analysis of Algorithms",
  "Database Management System",
  "Computer Networks",
  "Operating Systems",
  "Formal Language & Automata Theory",
  "Compiler Design",
];
const sem2 = [
  "Machine Learning",
  "Artificial Intelligence",
  "Speech & Natural language Processing",
  "Neural Network and Deep Learning",
  "Pattern Recognition",
];
const sem3 = [
  "Information Theory and Coding",
  "Computer Graphics",
  "Advance Computer Architecture",
  "Embedded System"
];
const sem4 = [
  "Discrete Mathematics",
  "Elementary Number Theory and Algebra",
  "Probability Theory and Random Process",
  "Engineering Economics",
  "Environmental Sciences",
  "Industrial Management Entrepreneurship",
  "Professional Communication"
];
const sem5 = [
  "Web and Internet Technology",
  "Cryptography and Network Security",
  "Ad-hoc and Sensor Network",
  "Blockchain Technology",
  "Information Retrieval"
];
const sem6 = [
  "Object Oriented Programming using java",
  "Software Interaction",
  "Software Component Design"
];
const sem7 = [
  "Digital Image Processing",
  "Bio-Informatics",
  "Robotics and Computer Vision"
];
const sem8 = ["VLSI System Design","Human Computer Interaction","Computer Controlled Systems"];
const elective = [
  "History of Science and Engineering",
  "Cyber Laws and Ethics",
  "Economics Policies in India"
];
const project=["1 Mini Projects",'2 Major Project']
export const semList1 = [
  "Basics",
  "Machine Intelligence",
  "Modelling & Optimization",
  "Managerial Skills",
  "Advanced Networks, Security and Applications",
  "Software Engineering",
  "Applied Computing",
  "Applied Systems",
  "Open Electives ",
  "Projects"
];

export const subjects1 = [
  sem1,
  sem2,
  sem3,
  sem4,
  sem5,
  sem6,
  sem7,
  sem8,
  elective,
  project
];
